Division_Name: This column represents the name of the business division within Lee's Market.
Form_Update_Status: This column indicates whether the division has received and incorporated the new knowledge-sharing forms into their workflows. 'True' means they have received and incorporated the forms, 'False' means they have not.
Update_Date: This column represents the date when the division incorporated the new knowledge-sharing forms into their workflows.
Total_Divisions: This column represents the total number of business divisions within Lee's Market.
Updated_Divisions: This column represents the number of divisions that have incorporated the new knowledge-sharing forms into their workflows.
